Decision on 2023-01-10 (Expansion): 'Expanded to Chennai branch'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$180,000. Confidence then: 62%. Lesson: Logistics and local market not analyzed. Closed after 5 months.

Decision on 2023-02-15 (Hiring): 'Hired 10 sales reps in Q1 2023'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$320,000. Confidence then: 78%. Lesson: Demand aligned with capacity. Revenue grew 18% within 2 quarters.

Decision on 2023-03-01 (Marketing): 'Cut prices by 10% to fight new competitor'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: -$25,000. Confidence then: 55%. Lesson: Volume grew 25% but gross margins dropped 12%. Profit flat.

Decision on 2023-04-20 (Operations): 'Invested in warehouse automation software'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$210,000. Confidence then: 82%. Lesson: Operational cost down 15%; picking errors near zero.

Decision on 2023-05-05 (Operations): 'Outsourced logistics to 3rd-party provider'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$140,000. Confidence then: 48%. Lesson: SLA breaches led to 40% increase in customer complaints.

Decision on 2023-06-12 (Product): 'Launched premium product line'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$275,000. Confidence then: 71%. Lesson: Brand differentiation. High margins offset lower volume.

Decision on 2023-07-18 (Marketing): 'Increased social media spend by 50%'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: +$15,000. Confidence then: 60%. Lesson: Awareness up but conversion rate was low. High CAC.

Decision on 2023-08-22 (Expansion): 'Expanded to Bangalore (new city, 2023)'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$220,000. Confidence then: 57%. Lesson: Underestimated competition. Did not localize. Exited in 6 months.

Decision on 2023-09-30 (Marketing): 'Implemented customer referral program'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$190,000. Confidence then: 75%. Lesson: LTV increased 22%. High-quality inbound leads.
Decision on 2023-10-14 (Hiring): 'Hired full-time CTO'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$450,000. Confidence then: 88%. Lesson: Tech debt cleared. Product velocity up 30%.

Decision on 2023-11-05 (Operations): 'Moved to remote-first work policy'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: -$8,000. Confidence then: 64%. Lesson: Employee satisfaction up; collaboration slightly reduced.

Decision on 2023-12-20 (Finance): 'Secured bulk inventory purchase at 20% discount'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$95,000. Confidence then: 52%. Lesson: No warehouse space. External storage costs ate the discount.
Decision on 2024-01-08 (Hiring): 'Promoted Priya Nair to Senior Sales Exec'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$95,000. Confidence then: 85%. Lesson: Win rate on enterprise deals improved 15%.

Decision on 2024-02-10 (Product): 'Launched API integration product tier'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$310,000. Confidence then: 80%. Lesson: 3 enterprise clients upsold immediately. ARR grew 22%.
Decision on 2024-03-01 (Finance): 'Renegotiated vendor contract for 3 years'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$130,000. Confidence then: 79%. Lesson: Fixed cost base. Saved 8% on COGS per year.

Decision on 2024-03-15 (Expansion): 'Opened Hyderabad co-working office'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: +$20,000. Confidence then: 65%. Lesson: Cost lower than expected, but team collaboration uneven.
Decision on 2024-04-01 (Hiring): 'Hired 2 operations coordinators'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$60,000. Confidence then: 74%. Lesson: Reduced delivery delay complaints by 35%.
Decision on 2024-04-20 (Marketing): 'Ran TV ad campaign for product launch'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$80,000. Confidence then: 45%. Lesson: Wrong channel for target audience. Low ROI.

Decision on 2024-05-10 (Product): 'Integrated AI-based churn prediction module'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$180,000. Confidence then: 83%. Lesson: Retained 5 at-risk enterprise clients. Saved $180k ARR.

Decision on 2024-05-25 (Finance): 'Invested in 2-year office lease extension'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$50,000. Confidence then: 76%. Lesson: Locked in current rate. Market rates rose 18% after signing.

Decision on 2024-06-05 (Operations): 'Adopted real-time inventory tracking system'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$155,000. Confidence then: 81%. Lesson: Stock-outs dropped 60%. On-time delivery improved to 94%.

Decision on 2024-06-20 (Hiring): 'Attempt to hire 5 senior developers'. Outcome: Failed. Financial impact: -$40,000. Confidence then: 55%. Lesson: Only 2 hired; 3 offers rejected due to below-market salary.

Decision on 2024-07-01 (Marketing): 'Launched B2B LinkedIn outreach campaign'. Outcome: Success. Financial impact: +$125,000. Confidence then: 72%. Lesson: Pipeline grew by 18 qualified deals in 45 days.

Decision on 2024-07-15 (Product): 'Delayed mobile app launch by 2 months'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: -$30,000. Confidence then: 61%. Lesson: Quality improved but competitor launched first. Market share dip.

Decision on 2024-08-01 (Expansion): 'Started Southeast Asia expansion feasibility'. Outcome: Mixed. Financial impact: +$10,000. Confidence then: 58%. Lesson: Research phase only. No commit yet. Market looks promising.
